latHint: Think your current workload - not a dinner plate.
pivHint: Your meal arrives on a PLATE - but 'what's on your PLATE' at work means what?
winText: A full workload. PLATE was the pivot - dinner PLATE to a list of TASKS.
lossText: TASKS - items of work, a workload. PLATE was the pivot: dinner PLATE to a full PLATE of TASKS.
